title: Interloper Music
description: Replaces some songs with music from the Interloper ARG by Anomidae.
body:
Music resource pack that changes some of the base game songs with the Interloper OST.

It sometimes works, sometimes doesn't. I have no idea what i'm doing so don't blame me if you never hear any custom music.

Felt the need to make this pack because it kinda fits horror mods and because no-one else has done it.
